mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MAIL_SEND_HIST_TBL (CMPYCD, DOCGB, SENDYMD, SENDNO, USERID, SEND_DATE, CUSTCD, EMAIL, SEND_EMAIL, SUBJECT, ATTACH_URL, SCHEDULE_TYPE, RESERVED_DATE, RESERVED_H, CONN_INFO, SENDYN, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{docgb}, #{sendymd}, #{sendno}, #{userid}, #{senddate}, #{custcd}, #{email}, #{sendemail}, #{subject}, #{attachurl}, #{scheduletype}, #{reserveddate}, #{reservedh}, #{conninfo}, #{sendyn}, #{addtime}, #{updtime}, #{updemp})
